headline: Networking and hardware poised for gains, Evercore flags top stocks to own
summary: Investing.com -- Hardware and networking stocks are well-positioned heading into earnings season, Evercore ISI said, flagging Dell as its top pick and arguing that resilient demand and higher average selling prices are likely to drive upside across much of its coverage.

headline: Wall Street's Insights Into Key Metrics Ahead of NetApp (NTAP) Q4 Earnings
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for NetApp (NTAP), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended April 2026.

headline: Zoom Upbeat Q1 Results, Joins Lionsgate Studios, Ross Stores And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Friday
summary: Zoom Communications Inc shares rise after strong financial results and increased buyback authorization. Other big gainers include IMRX, INFQ, ASMB, IMAX, RGTI, HLIT, DELL, EL, GSIT, ELVR, and HPQ.
